code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import"./App.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[tasks,setTasks]=useState([]);const[title,setTitle]=useState("");useEffect(()=>{fetchTasks();},[]);const fetchTasks=async()=>{const res=await axios.get("http://localhost:5000/tasks");setTasks(res.data);};const addTask=async()=>{if(!title)return;await axios.post("http://localhost:5000/tasks",{title});setTitle("");fetchTasks();};const deleteTask=async id=>{await axios.delete(`http://localhost:5000/tasks/${id}`);fetchTasks();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"\u2728 Task Manager"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"input-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:title,onChange:e=>setTitle(e.target.value),placeholder:"Enter task..."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:addTask,children:"Add"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:tasks.map(task=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[task.title,/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"delete-btn",onClick:()=>deleteTask(task.id),children:"\u274C"})]},task.id))})]});}export default App;
